regulations.name: Civil Aviation Requirements (CAR) — Section 3, Series X, Part I
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Original civil drone regulations — NPNT, UIN, op-area restrictions; replaced by Drone Rules 2021.

regulations.name: Drone Rules 2021
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Comprehensive replacement of CAR Section 3 Series X Part I. Reduced fees, simplified type-certification, abolished UIN, introduced type certificate + drone registration. Yellow/red/green zones.

regulations.name: Drone (Amendment) Rules 2022
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Removed requirement for drone pilot licence — replaced with remote pilot certificate (RPC) issued by authorised schools.

regulations.name: DGFT Import Policy for Drones
regulations.applies: All importers of drones into India
regulations.summary: Banned import of foreign drones (except R&D, defence, and security purposes). Boost to Make-in-India drone industry.

regulations.name: PLI Scheme for Drones and Drone Components
regulations.applies: Indian drone manufacturers
regulations.summary: Rs 120 Cr outlay over 3 years (FY22-24). 20% value-addition threshold. Targets indigenous drone component manufacturing.

regulations.name: Digital Sky Platform
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Online registration, permission, and tracking portal. Mandatory for all drone flights in green zone.

regulations.name: Drone (Amendment) Rules 2023 — Yellow Zone
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Reduced yellow zone from 45 m to 60 m AGL (above ground level) — opens up more airspace for civil drones.

regulations.name: Type-Certification Requirements
regulations.applies: All drone manufacturers selling in India
regulations.summary: All drones operating in India require DGCA type-certificate (or equivalent). NPNT compliance mandatory.

regulations.name: Counter-UAS SOPs — Civil Airports
regulations.applies: All civil airports in India
regulations.summary: Standard Operating Procedure for handling drone sightings at civil airports. C-UAS deployment by CISF + AAI.

regulations.name: Make-II Procedure — Drones
regulations.applies: Indian drone industry for defence
regulations.summary: Make-II category — industry-funded prototype development; if accepted, govt places 3-year order. Multiple drone projects approved.

regulations.name: Remote Pilot Certificate (RPC) framework
regulations.applies: All civil drone pilots
regulations.summary: Replaced drone pilot licence. RPC issued by DGCA-authorised Remote Pilot Training Organisations (RPTOs).

regulations.name: BVLOS Drone Operations — Guidelines
regulations.applies: Approved BVLOS operators
regulations.summary: Framework for experimental BVLOS (Beyond Visual Line of Sight) drone operations. Consortium-based approach.

regulations.name: UTM (Unmanned Traffic Management) Framework
regulations.applies: All UTM providers in India
regulations.summary: Framework for UTM service providers — drone traffic deconfliction in low-altitude airspace.

regulations.name: Drone Yatra / SVAMITVA Scheme
regulations.applies: Survey of India + drone operators
regulations.summary: Scheme for mapping rural land records using drones — first large-scale govt drone deployment.

regulations.name: Drone Rules — UTM / NPNT (Amendment 2024)
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Latest amendment — updated NPNT protocol, mandatory real-time tracking via Digital Sky.

regulations.name: Drone Certification of Airworthiness — DGCA Circular
regulations.applies: All drone manufacturers selling in India
regulations.summary: Process for obtaining Certificate of Airworthiness — required for type certification.

regulations.name: Remote Pilot Training Organisation (RPTO) Guidelines
regulations.applies: DGCA-authorised drone training schools
regulations.summary: Standards for RPTO accreditation — mandatory curriculum, instructor ratios, equipment requirements.

regulations.name: Drone Operation in Yellow Zone — Permission Framework
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Updated permission framework for Yellow Zone flights (12 km from airport perimeter). Digital Sky permission mandatory.

regulations.name: Drone Operation in Red Zone — Complete Prohibition
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Red Zone — no civil drone flights permitted (military installations, strategic locations). Updated list maintained by MoD.

regulations.name: Counter-UAS SOPs — Strategic Locations
regulations.applies: All strategic locations (VVIP, military, nuclear, refineries
regulations.summary: Standard Operating Procedure for handling drone threats at strategic locations. Hard-kill + soft-kill C-UAS deployment.

regulations.name: Drone (Amendment) Rules 2024 — Real-time Tracking
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Mandatory real-time tracking via Digital Sky for all drone flights (excluding nano category). Updated NPNT protocol.

regulations.name: Drone Operations at Night — DGCA Permission Framework
regulations.applies: All civil RPAS operators in India
regulations.summary: Permission framework for night-time drone operations — additional lighting + transponder requirements.

regulations.name: State Drone Policies — Telangana State Drone Policy 2021
regulations.applies: Drone operators in Telangana
regulations.summary: First state-level drone policy — drone-as-a-service, training infrastructure, R&D incentives. Other states followed (AP, Kerala, Karnataka).

regulations.name: State Drone Policies — Maharashtra Drone Policy 2022
regulations.applies: Drone operators in Maharashtra
regulations.summary: State drone policy — drone corridors, agri-drone focus, training. ₹100 Cr state-level incentive.

regulations.name: Make-I Category — Indigenous HALE UAV
regulations.applies: Indian industry (Newspace Research)
regulations.summary: Make-I category — government-funded prototype development for HALE UAV. Newspace Research MeherMuktami programme.
